overview.short: Sree Bhuvaneswary Temple, Valamchuzy is one of the oldest temples in Pathanamthitta, South India.

topPlaces.name: St. George's Church, Mylapra
topPlaces.description: Mylapra Valiyapalli or St. George Orthodox Church, Mylapra, referred to as Chakkittayil palli (ചക്കിട്ടേൽ പള്ളി) is a pilgrim center located in the village of Mylapra, in the India state of Kerala.

topPlaces.name: Sacred Heart Malankara Catholic Church, Mylapra
topPlaces.description: Sacred Heart Malankara Syrian Catholic Church or referred as S H Church is located in the village of Mylapra, near Pathanamthitta, on the road side of the Main Eastern Highway in the Indian state of Kerala. It is home to one of the first Syro-Malankara Catholic Church communities and is the biggest and oldest established church in the Eparchy of Pathanamthitta.

image.alt: Sacred Heart Malankara Catholic Church, Mylapra

topPlaces.name: Valamchuzhy
topPlaces.description: Valamchuzy is a village in the banks of Achankovil river in Pathanamthitta district, Kerala, India. It is in Pramadaom Grama Panchayat of Konni Taluk.

topPlaces.name: Kumbazha
topPlaces.description: Kumbazha is a main junction nestled within the heart of Pathanamthitta Municipality of Pathanamthitta Town, located in Kerala state, India. The serene Achenkovil river gracefully meanders through this historic locale.

topPlaces.name: Chayalode
topPlaces.description: Chayalode is a ward situated in the central Travancore region in the state of Kerala, India. Chayalode has a hilly terrain, and it is covered by rubber estates.

topPlaces.name: Pathanamthitta
topPlaces.description: Pathanamthitta (IPA: [pɐt̪ːɐnɐn̪d̪iʈːɐ]), is a Municipal Town in southern Kerala, India, spread over an area of 23.5 km2 (9.1 sq mi). It is the administrative capital of Pathanamthitta district.

topPlaces.name: Kodumthara
topPlaces.description: Kodumthara is a village just outside Pathanamthitta City Suburbs, located in Kerala state, India. .

topPlaces.name: Mount Bethany EHSS
topPlaces.description: Mount Bethany English Medium Higher Secondary School is a school in Kerala, India. The school began providing education to lower primary level classes in the late 1970s.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Sree Bhuvaneswary Temple, Valamchuzhy?
faq.a: The best time to visit Sree Bhuvaneswary Temple, Valamchuzhy is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Sree Bhuvaneswary Temple, Valamchuzhy?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Thiruvananthapuram International Airport (88 km) and the nearest railway station is Thiruvananthapuram Central (88 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Sree Bhuvaneswary Temple, Valamchuzhy?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Sree Bhuvaneswary Temple, Valamchuzhy at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Sree Bhuvaneswary Temple, Valamchuzhy?
faq.a: Stays in Sree Bhuvaneswary Temple, Valamchuzhy start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Sree Bhuvaneswary Temple, Valamchuzhy?
faq.a: The top attractions are St. George's Church, Mylapra, Sacred Heart Malankara Catholic Church, Mylapra, Valamchuzhy, Kumbazha, Chayalode.
